title: AuthPermissions::as_raw_mut doc names no C macros to look up
description: auth.rs AuthPermissions::as_raw_mut: the doc says 'for use with wolfHSM C macros that set individual permission bits' but names no macro. A user who wants to set a permission has to search the wolfHSM headers for macros on whAuthPermissions. Add one or two example macro names (e.g. WH_AUTH_PERM_SET_xxx from wh_auth.h) to the doc comment so a reader knows where to start, even if the full list is in the header.
